summary: AAOI is surging on record Q4-2025 results and explosive forward guidance, with management forecasting demand could surge 10x driven by AI-related expansion. The stock has rallied over 40% post-earnings and is trading at its 52-week high, now well above analyst mean price targets. The tweet author expresses regret at missing a technical re-entry on the cup-and-handle breakout retest a month ago, underscoring the strength of the move.

AAOI is experiencing a massive rally, hitting 52-week highs near $84 after record Q4-2025 revenue and a forecast suggesting demand could surge 10x. The stock has already rallied over 40% on earnings and guidance, with the current price now exceeding analyst mean target of $77.30, suggesting the easy money has been made.

Colgate-Palmolive (CL) is trading near its 52-week high at $99.14, but faces a 'sell the news' dynamic as noted by traders. The stock is trading above the analyst mean target price of $97.21, suggesting limited upside, while carrying an elevated P/E of 37.7x.

Colgate-Palmolive (CL) is trading near its 52-week high at $99.14, up ~1.6% from previous close, but faces a 'sell the news' dynamic flagged by traders. The stock trades at a rich 37.7x trailing P/E, above the analyst mean target of $97.21, suggesting limited upside and potential overvaluation at current levels.
